description: Triggers for McKinsey-style structured strategic analysis and business problem solving

queries.query: Help me structure a complex business problem using a hypothesis tree
Run a MECE analysis of why our churn rate increased last quarter
Create an executive-ready recommendation for our board on whether to enter Europe
Apply the McKinsey issue tree approach to this pricing problem
Build a structured analysis of our market positioning relative to competitors
Help me think through this strategic decision using a structured consulting framework
Diagnose why our sales funnel is underperforming using a top-down analysis
Create a pyramid principle presentation structure for this strategic recommendation
What's the MECE breakdown of our customer retention problem?
Structure a business case for this investment decision using consulting frameworks
Build an ABX marketing strategy for our enterprise product
Help me write a resume for a consulting role
Set up my product discovery process with OSTs
Create a product strategy canvas for our SaaS
Transcribe this stakeholder meeting recording
Help me design the architecture for our new service
Write a cover letter for a McKinsey application
Build an Opportunity Solution Tree for user retention
Fix this bug in my Python script
Optimize my resume for strategy consulting roles
